action.reasoning: Observation: ExpRate 10.43% on test. Loss still declining at 1.30 after 50 epochs. ~47s/epoch. Analysis: Model underfitting, need more capacity and longer training. Decision: Increase model size (d_model=384, 6 layers, 2048 ff), cosine LR schedule with warmup, mixed precision, train 80 epochs (~63 min).
